channel.title: The Strange Archive
channel.description: Urban legends, lost worlds, mythic objects, and strange folklore records.

item.title: The Woman in White at the Bend: Why This Roadside Legend Still Feels Familiar
item.description: A pale figure by a bend in the road, a driver who slows down, and a story that never quite leaves the shoulder.

item.title: Hy-Brasil: The Island That Stayed on the Map After It Vanished
item.description: A legendary island west of Ireland appeared on maps for centuries, then slipped back into the fog between folklore and geography.

item.title: The Bell Under the Lake: Why Sunken Bells Keep Ringing in Folklore
item.description: In many old stories, a bell lies beneath the water and rings only when the past wants to be heard.
